effort_complexity.rationale: One function's cwd derivation plus a subdir-module test fixture; known shape.

design_decisions.choice: Multiple first-level Go modules under the worktree -> skip-with-reason, not "pick one".
design_decisions.rationale: Noted default: spec scopes multi-module out (out_of_scope[1]) and R-01 warns against picking the wrong go.mod; an explicit skip reason avoids reporting a partial result as the whole Go suite. Reversible in a follow-up multi-module slice.

design_decisions.choice: Go module discovery depth = worktree root, else first-level subdirectories only (no recursive walk).
design_decisions.rationale: Noted default: matches spec in_scope wording ("repo-root go.mod, else a single-level subdir like <worktree>/go"); cheaper and avoids vendored/fixture go.mod false positives below level 1 by construction.
